name: Blackberry Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Fresh blackberries, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Cut in the shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles large coarse crumbs.
3. Sprinkle cold water over the flour mixture using a fork to stir gently until it gathers into a ball (the less water used, the better).
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured board and shape with your hands into two balls, one slightly larger than the other.
5. Chill dough for 1 hour, then roll out the large ball to fit the bottom of a 9 or 10-inch pie dish.
6. In a separate bowl, mix sugar and all-purpose flour, then add a dash of salt and stir in the berries.
7. Pour the mixture into the empty pie shell.
8. Roll out the remaining dough ball to make the top crust.
9. Crimp and trim edges, then slash the top crust several places.
10. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown. Makes 1 - 10-inch pie.
